blog_title: ₹2 Thread Difference = 200 Pieces Rejected — Rayon vs Polyester Thread for Machine Embroidery Business in I...
caption:
₹2 thread saved = ₹10,000 lost 😬

A printer used cheap polyester thread to cut costs on a 200-piece embroidery batch. Client rejected everything — dull finish, uneven tension, broken stitches. Full order wasted.

Rayon vs polyester isn't just about shine. It's about rejection rates and your reputation.

Save this if you're sourcing embroidery blanks for your next order 👇
